WritingAboutProjects

Providing Feedback to Fellow Builders

June 21, 2024

Supporting Other Builders

What:

  • Provided product feedback to 3 recent projects that I've used.

[Icebreaker](https://icebreaker.xyz/)

  • I use this app for people I meet IRL to scan my phone wallpaper in order to stay in touch.
  • Dan and Jack invited me to a super candid conversation about recruitment, networking and Icebreaker competition too.
  • I'm bullish about Icebreaker and heard an integration with Talent Passport is coming.

[Bountycaster](https://bountycaster.xyz)

  • Used Bountycaster bot on Farcaster to find someone to create a video for Summer Builders NFT collection.
  • Paid 4M $BUILD to the best execution!
  • Reached out to Linda with some feedback, got an instant reply.
  • Ended up 'scouting' a recent cool release: Bountycaster onchain attestations.

[Beearly](https://beearly.club)

  • Used Beearly to create a waitlist frame for Summer of $TALENT.
  • I already knew Limone and the Builders Garden team.
  • Shared some feedback so they can improve the product, definitely recommend for someone launching some new and cool on Farcaster.
